description: Guided coachmark tour (H10) — presents features within the product with progress dots, Skip and Next. Controlled: the host owns index and answers the four events.

open.description: Whether the tour is shown. Closed renders nothing, scrim included.

steps.description: The tour, in order. An empty tour renders nothing.

index.description: Which step is current. The host owns it and answers next/back.

anchor.description: Where to attach the coachmark, as the two viewport coordinates it positions from. Absent floats it bottom-right.

next.description: Next was activated on a step that is not the last.

back.description: Back was activated on a step that is not the first.

skip.description: Skip was activated, or the scrim was clicked.

done.description: The final step's confirming control was activated.
